data.body: Done. Swept dso/brainstorm/preplanning residue across src/ + docs/ (comment/doc only, no behavior change) plus the 3 listed test sites (conftest.py _network_guard misname, test-ticket-lib.sh dead 'DSO WARN' grep alternation x3, test_rebar_id_label_writers.py dso-config.conf->.rebar/config.conf). AC grep 'git grep -inE "/dso:|plugins/dso|dso-config|dso ticket " src/ docs/' now returns NOTHING. The only remaining 'dso' hits in src/ are the 3 deliberate 'DSO_* support removed' documentation lines (rebar-config.sh, applier.py, outbound_differ.py) — documented residue per the epic. Out-of-scope-by-design (kept): DSO-N Jira test keys (pure test data), brainstorm:complete tag fixtures (real tag values asserting the gate was removed), /fake/dso CLI paths, and historical bug-id citations (dso-jwan etc.). Full suite green (1311).
